master_row.title: Delta Scaling Law
master_row.canonical_statement: \begin{theorem}[Modulation Signatures] The helical coupling predicts observable modulations in gravitational wave signals: \begin{enumerate} \item \textbf{Amplitude Modulation}: \begin{equation} \delta A_{\text{GW}} = \epsilon \left|\int \Psi_{\text{solar}} \cdot h_{\mu\nu} \, d^3x\right| \sim 10^{-24} \text{ strain} \end{equation}
master_row.formation_note: Recovered from a D:\All source document under ‘Observable Predictions from Solar-GW Coupling’.
master_row.dictionary: Delta Scaling Law — δ A_GW = ε |∫ Ψ_solar · h_μν d^3x | ∼ 10^-24 strain
master_row.encyclopedia: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00AllEdit\analysis_all_edit_focus_11_22\output\all_edit_equation_arc_compact_curated.csv` for registry alignment and later derivation.
